# UniFi Mobility v0.5.0

## 中文

- 诊断下载新增最近成功时间、连续失败、当前退避间隔、RPC 失败次数及各数据分区的新鲜度。
- 加入 UMR-Industrial-EU `1.17.11` 脱敏固件样本和自动兼容性测试。
- 统一校验路由器地址，支持主机名、IPv4、端口和 IPv6。
- 完善 HACS ZIP 发布元数据、一键添加链接、兼容矩阵和定时验证。

## English

- Expands redacted diagnostics with polling health and data freshness details.
- Adds an anonymized UMR-Industrial-EU `1.17.11` compatibility fixture.
- Normalizes host names, IPv4, ports, and IPv6 router origins.
- Prepares HACS ZIP metadata, one-click installation, compatibility docs, and
  scheduled validation.
